title: Sales Tax Calculator - Free Online Tool
description: Free sales tax calculator. Quickly calculate sales tax amount and total price for any purchase. Works for all US states and custom tax rates.
keywords: sales tax calculator, tax calculator, sales tax rate, calculate tax, state sales tax
intro: Calculate sales tax and total cost for any purchase. Enter the price and tax rate to get instant results.

faq.q: How do I calculate sales tax?
faq.a: Multiply the item price by the tax rate (as a decimal). For example, $100 × 0.08 = $8 tax, total = $108.

faq.q: What is the average US sales tax rate?
faq.a: The average combined state and local sales tax rate in the US is approximately 7.12%, but it varies by state from 0% to over 10%.

faq.q: Can I calculate the pre-tax price from a total?
faq.a: Yes, divide the total by (1 + tax rate). For example, $108 ÷ 1.08 = $100 pre-tax price.
